gpu_full.label: GPU max offload
gpu_full.description: `lms load --gpu max` (100% GPU offload). Weights on GPU; best throughput when estimated GPU memory fits host headroom (~6.8 GiB for qwen3.5-9b on this host).

gpu_offload.label: CPU-only (gpu off)
gpu_offload.description: `lms load --gpu off` (0% GPU). CPU RAM holds weights; use when max exceeds VRAM (e.g. gemma-4-26b @ 17.4 GiB) or measured matrix prefers it (qwen3.5-9b smoke: 63% vs 50%).

gpu_partial_0.3.label: GPU partial 30%
gpu_partial_0.3.description: `lms load --gpu 0.3` (30% GPU offload). Secures ~5.25 GiB GPU layers (est) for 26B/31B-class before cpu-only fallback. Minimal GPU share for speed/quality vs pure offload on large models per placementHints.

gpu_partial_0.35.label: GPU partial 35%
gpu_partial_0.35.description: `lms load --gpu 0.35` (35% GPU offload). Targeted for 31B models (~ est 6.8-7 GiB GPU share). Use when 0.3 insufficient for outcome but full/max fails guard.

gpu_partial_0.36.label: GPU partial 36%
gpu_partial_0.36.description: `lms load --gpu 0.36` (36% GPU offload). QAT 31B variant per system placement (18.66 GiB est). Balance GPU accel vs 8GB headroom (~6.8 GiB).

gpu_partial_0.39.label: GPU partial 39%
gpu_partial_0.39.description: `lms load --gpu 0.39` (39% GPU offload). Primary for 26B-A4B per system-profile placementHints (6.99 GiB est GPU). Research/partial for large to gain layers vs off (0.04 GiB); guard may still flag but measured for outcome.

gpu_partial_0.5.label: GPU partial 50%
gpu_partial_0.5.description: `lms load --gpu 0.5` (50% GPU offload). Mid-range for 9-12B borderline (3.7-4.9 GiB GPU on qwen/12b). Speed/quality tradeoff vs off or higher partials.

gpu_partial_0.7.label: GPU partial 70%
gpu_partial_0.7.description: `lms load --gpu 0.7` (70% GPU offload). Higher share for 9B-class when headroom allows (qwen ~4.93 GiB est). For tps boost on mid models vs 0.5/0.95.

gpu_partial_0.88.label: GPU partial 88%
gpu_partial_0.88.description: `lms load --gpu 0.88` (88% GPU offload). For GLM-4.6v-flash and 12B per placement (6.78 GiB est on 12B). Near-headroom partial for speed on 7-8GiB models.

gpu_partial_0.9.label: GPU partial 90%
gpu_partial_0.9.description: `lms load --gpu 0.9` (90% GPU offload). For 12B per system placementHints (6.94 GiB est). High partial for max GPU benefit while 'may load' per estimates; use before offload if guard permits.

gpu_partial_0.95.label: GPU partial 95%
gpu_partial_0.95.description: `lms load --gpu 0.95` (95% GPU offload). For Qwen (6.64 GiB) and 12B-QAT per placement (est). Highest partial before full; measured data for qwen prefers offload override despite est.

liquid/lfm2.5-1.2b.rationale: 1.28 GiB est fits full GPU easily (1.28 GiB est at 100%); max layers for highest tps/lowest latency/speed. Smoke 38% but fastest cell (~4s). Use for triage, quick chat, brief pre-filter.

nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-4b.rationale: 4.16 GiB est fits full (per system placement); small+full = speed king for 4B class.

google/gemma-4-e2b.rationale: 5.75 GiB est fits full per placement; full GPU for speed on 4.6B vision/tool model.

essentialai/rnj-1.rationale: 5.09 GiB est fits full; full for speed on 8.3B.

google/gemma-4-e4b.rationale: ~5.9 GiB est fits full per system; full GPU speed for 7.5B.

qwen/qwen3.5-9b.rationale: Smoke leader: 5/8 passes 63% (vs 50% full, 13pp offload win on plan-synthetic). Placement + measured override (max 6.85 GiB borderline); daily-briefs tps~38.4 viable. Best outcome for plan/tool/briefs/specialist vs baselines.

zai-org/glm-4.6v-flash.rationale: 7.74 GiB est; placement 0.88 for ~6.8 GiB GPU share. Partial for speed on 9.4B vision model; offload fallback.

google/gemma-4-12b.rationale: 7.57 GiB est; 0.9 yields 6.94 GiB GPU ('may' per est, near 6.8 headroom); placement suggested 0.9. Partial for outcome/speed balance on 12B vs full (7.57) or off.

google/gemma-4-12b-qat.rationale: 7.18 GiB est; placement 0.95 partial per system. High partial for QAT 12B speed.

google/gemma-4-26b-a4b.rationale: 17.43 GiB est; 0.39 ~6.99 GiB GPU (placement primary). Some GPU layers for speed/quality vs pure off (0.04 GiB, slow); guard 'fail' on est but research per Exhaustive. Off for strict safety.

google/gemma-4-31b.rationale: 19.65 GiB est; placement 0.35 (~6.8-7 GiB GPU share). Minimal partial before off for 31B.

google/gemma-4-31b-qat.rationale: 18.66 GiB est; placement 0.36. QAT variant partial for large-model GPU assist.

notes: Profile ids are eval labels, not LM Studio defaults. Read results/system-profile.json (placementHints) + run lms load --estimate-only before tuning.

Partials (gpu_partial_0.XX) implemented 2026-06-07 per system-profile placementHints (0.39/0.9/0.88/0.35/0.36/0.95 etc.) + live estimates on 4 reps (lfm/qwen/12b/26b). See docs/evals/2026-06-07-configs-optimization-report.md.
Matrix serializes loads; `lms unload --all` between cells. Reserve ~1.2 GiB VRAM for KV/runtime beyond weight estimates. GPU constraint: 1 model at a time on this 8GB rig.

Per-model recommendations (bestPreset) added from estimates + measured smoke (qwen offload 63% leader) + placement. Test gpu_full + gpu_offload (or suggested partial) where model exceeds VRAM headroom.
No full inference loads during research (estimate-only only); full matrix cells via unattended `pnpm matrix:full` when GPU free.
